skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI-powered video creation agent that produces professional short videos (5-120 seconds) for any purpose - ads, social media, explainers, and more.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Evaluated 534 static patterns across 13 files. All findings are false positives from a legitimate video production API client. The CRITICAL 'Windows SAM database' alert triggered on the word 'SAME' in SKILL.md:43 (a language instruction). Obfuscation heuristics fired due to the expected combination of network, filesystem, and credential access in a CLI tool. Shell scripts use standard command substitution for curl, jq, and mktemp. They read documented API keys from ~/.pexo/config, make HTTPS calls to pexo.ai, and access temp directories for uploads. No malicious intent, data exfiltration, or injection vulnerabilities found.

low_findings.title: Documentation contains shell command examples
low_findings.description: Reference documentation files contain markdown code blocks with shell commands and backticks for user setup instructions. These are documentation, not executable code. No command injection risk exists.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Files are clearly labeled as setup guides and troubleshooting docs. Content is instructional text for human readers, not executable scripts.

low_findings.title: Legitimate network access to documented API endpoints
low_findings.description: Shell scripts make HTTPS requests to pexo.ai API endpoints for video production workflows. Hardcoded URLs in documentation and scripts all point to the legitimate service domain. No unauthorized external communication or data exfiltration.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All network calls are to documented pexo.ai endpoints using authenticated curl requests. URLs are hardcoded to the service's own domain.

low_findings.title: Legitimate filesystem access for configuration and temp files
low_findings.description: Scripts access ~/.pexo/config for API credentials, ~/.pexo/tmp for downloaded assets, and use mktemp for temporary files during HTTP requests. These are standard patterns for a CLI tool. No unauthorized file access or sensitive data exposure.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: File paths are constrained to documented config and temp directories. Access patterns match expected CLI behavior with no traversal vulnerabilities.

low_findings.title: Legitimate environment variable access for documented configuration
low_findings.description: Scripts read documented environment variables (PEXO_API_KEY, PEXO_BASE_URL, PEXO_CONFIG, PEXO_TMP_DIR, PEXO_CONNECT_TIMEOUT, PEXO_REQUEST_TIMEOUT) for API authentication and configuration. All variables are explicitly documented in SKILL.md and setup guides.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Every accessed environment variable is documented and required for the API client to function. No secret harvesting or unauthorized credential access.

content.value_statement: Struggling to produce professional videos? Pexo AI handles scriptwriting, visuals, and editing automatically. Generate polished short videos for social media, marketing, and education in under 2 minutes.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5-120 second videos for any purpose (ads, social posts, explainers, product demos)
Accept text prompts and uploaded media files (images, video clips, audio) as input
Produce videos in multiple aspect ratios (16:9 horizontal, 9:16 vertical, 1:1 square)
Handle end-to-end video production including scriptwriting, shot composition, and transitions
Support project-based workflows where users can iterate and refine videos
Provide asset management (upload media, retrieve generated videos)
limitations: Cannot create videos longer than 120 seconds - designed specifically for short-form content
Requires active internet connection and valid Pexo API key to function
Depends on external Pexo.ai service availability and response times
Limited to file types supported by the platform (common image/video/audio formats only)

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creator
use_cases.description: Create daily TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts from product photos or simple text descriptions. Generate engaging vertical videos without manual editing.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers, influencers, content marketers

use_cases.title: Product Marketing Videos
use_cases.description: Transform product images into polished promotional videos with automatic scripting, transitions, and music. Perfect for e-commerce listings and ad campaigns.
use_cases.target_user: E-commerce store owners, digital marketers, small business owners

use_cases.title: Educational Explainer Videos
use_cases.description: Turn complex topics into clear, concise visual explanations. Upload diagrams or describe concepts and receive animated explainers suitable for training or tutorials.
use_cases.target_user: Teachers, trainers, instructional designers, technical writers

prompt_templates.title: Basic Video Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second promotional video for my coffee shop. Use warm, inviting tones.
prompt_templates.scenario: Simple video generation from text description

prompt_templates.title: Video with Media Upload
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a product video using this image: [upload product.jpg]. Show the features in a 15-second dynamic style.
prompt_templates.scenario: Generate video incorporating uploaded product photos

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Format Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create three versions of the same video: a 60-second horizontal version for YouTube, a 30-second vertical version for TikTok, and a square version for Instagram.
prompt_templates.scenario: Generate multiple aspect ratios from single request

prompt_templates.title: Iterative Refinement
prompt_templates.prompt: The previous video is good but make it 15 seconds shorter and use faster cuts. Keep the energetic music style.
prompt_templates.scenario: Refine existing video project with specific feedback

output_examples.input: Create a 15-second TikTok video promoting my new fitness app. High energy, motivational style.
output_examples.output:
✅ Video created successfully! Duration: 15 seconds. Format: 9:16 vertical.
📥 Download: https://pexo.ai/assets/vid_abc123
🎬 Included: Dynamic text overlays, workout footage montage, upbeat background music.

output_examples.input: Make a product video for [sneakers.jpg uploaded]. Focus on the design details.
output_examples.output:
✅ Asset uploaded: asset_xyz789
✅ Video rendering... (45 seconds)
✅ Video complete! 30-second product showcase.
📥 Download: https://pexo.ai/assets/vid_def456
🎬 Shots: 360° rotation, close-up details, lifestyle montage.

best_practices: Provide clear, specific descriptions of the video style, duration, and purpose rather than vague requests. Mention target audience and platform for better results.
Upload high-quality source media (minimum 1080p resolution for video, PNG/JPG for images) to ensure professional output quality.
Start with shorter videos (15-30 seconds) to test different styles and approaches before requesting longer formats.
anti_patterns: Do not add technical parameters like aspect ratio, resolution, or codec settings unless specifically asked - Pexo determines these automatically based on the use case.
Avoid providing creative direction beyond the core concept (scriptwriting, shot composition, music selection). Pexo's backend specializes in these decisions better than manual prompting.
Never request videos longer than 120 seconds or attempt to concatenate multiple video projects. This exceeds the skill's designed capabilities and will fail.

faq.question: What video lengths can Pexo create?
faq.answer: Pexo generates short videos from 5 to 120 seconds. It is optimized for social media content, ads, and explainers rather than long-form content.

faq.question: Do I need video editing experience?
faq.answer: No. Pexo handles all editing automatically including scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music. Just describe what you want.

faq.question: What file formats can I upload?
faq.answer: Images: JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC. Videos: MP4, MOV, AVI. Audio: MP3, WAV, AAC, M4A, OGG, FLAC.

faq.question: Can I use the videos commercially?
faq.answer: Yes. Videos you create with Pexo are yours to use commercially. Check your Pexo subscription plan for usage rights and licensing details.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Most videos complete in 30-90 seconds. Longer videos or complex requests may take up to 2 minutes. The skill polls automatically and downloads when ready.

faq.question: What if I am not satisfied with the video?
faq.answer: You can refine any project by providing feedback. The skill supports iterative improvements - ask for changes to style, pacing, or content.
